combat_focus.name: Focus
combat_focus.description: Your character's prescision, fighting skill, and mental fortitude. Adds to your Accuracy Checks, Initiative Checks, and Resolve Score.

combat_mobility.name: Mobility
combat_mobility.description: Your character's speed and reflexes. Adds to your Movement Speed, Initiative, and Avoidance Score.

combat_power.name: Power
combat_power.description: Your character's strength both physically and/or with their powers. Adds to your Damage Rolls, Condition Checks, Capacity Score, and Sttability Score.

combat_endurance.name: Endurance
combat_endurance.description: Your chracter's physical toughness and fortitude. Adds to your Survival Checks, Vitality Score, and Durability Score.

utility_awareness.name: Awareness
utility_awareness.description: Your character's ability to notice things in the world. Also adds to your Initiative. Awareness players will have an easier time picking up on things already set in the narrative such as finding hidden information.

utility_communication.name: Communication
utility_communication.description: Your character’s social skills. Communication players are able to better shape the narrative to their goals such as persuading a truce between two warring factions.

utility_intelligence.name: Intelligence
utility_intelligence.description: Your character’s knowledge and reasoning. Intelligence players are able to unlock paths previously inaccesible such as hacking into a database to add the party to the guest list.

movement_swift.name: Swift
movement_swift.description:
Movement speed increased by half your Tier (rounded up)
Traverse the battlefield quicker

movement_skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
movement_skirmisher.description:
Does not trigger Punish Attacks for moving
+1 space melee attack reach
Maneuver through enemy lines freely

movement_behemoth.name: Behemoth
movement_behemoth.description:
Cannot be Grabbed, Moved, knocked Prone, or Stunned
Consistent positioning regardless of enemy interference

movement_vanguard.name: Vanguard
movement_vanguard.description:
Enemies that start their turn next to your have their movement speed halved until the start of their next turn.
As part of a reaction Punish attack, you may move up to your full movement speed towards the target until the end of their turn.
Enhanced zone control and battlefield presence

effects.description: Enemies starting adjacent have their movement speed halved.
Can move up to full movement speed as part of a reaction Punish attack.

movement_mole.name: Mole
movement_mole.description:
Move your full speed through soft materials (dirt, clay, loose rock)
Move half your speed through hard materials (concrete, granite, packed rock)
Choose: Create permanent tunnels OR temporary paths
Cannot end turn underground without tunnel creation

effects.description: Move full speed through soft terrain (dirt, clay).
Move half speed through hard terrain (rock, concrete).
Cannot end turn underground without creating a tunnel.

movement_flight.name: Flight (Alternative)
movement_flight.description: Move in any direction, ignore ground obstacles, and suffer no terrain penalties.

movement_teleportation.name: Teleportation (Alternative)
movement_teleportation.description: Instant movement to visible locations. Incurs a -2 sp movement penalty.

movement_portal.name: Portal (Alternative)
movement_portal.description: Create a pair of linked portals within your movement range. Anyone can move and act through them, and they persist until the start of your next turn.

effects.description: Create linked portals within movement range, lasting 1 turn.

movement_swinging.name: Swinging (Alternative)
movement_swinging.description: Move to any point that has a stable surface you can connect to and move your full speed on any solid surface. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

movement_superjump.name: Super Jump (Alternative)
movement_superjump.description: You can jump up to your full movement speed in one leap. +1 sp at Tiers 1-6 then +2 sp at Tiers 7+.

attacktype_singletarget.name: Single Target
attacktype_singletarget.description:
Gain Melee AND Ranged attack types for 0p
Specializes in single-target elimination
Most versatile combat approach

attacktype_aoespecialist.name: AOE Specialist
attacktype_aoespecialist.description:
Gain AOE attack type for 0p
Excels at crowd control and managing multiple targets
Weaker than single target but hits many

attacktype_directspecialist.name: Direct Specialist
attacktype_directspecialist.description:
Gain Direct attack type for 0p
Reliable effect delivery that cannot be dodged
Perfect for consistent results

effecttype_damagespecialist.name: Damage Specialist
effecttype_damagespecialist.description:
Focus purely on dealing damage
Maximum damage potential
Can still use Basic Conditions as separate attacks

effecttype_hybridspecialist.name: Hybrid Specialist
effecttype_hybridspecialist.description:
All attacks MUST combine damage and conditions
Mandatory Hybrid Attacks
Versatile but less powerful in each aspect

effecttype_crowdcontrol.name: Crowd Control
effecttype_crowdcontrol.description:
Free access to 2 Advanced condition effects (chosen at selection)
Trade-off: -Tier to all Damage rolls
Specializes in enemy control and debilitation
Strong team support role

uniqueability_versatilemaster.name: Versatile Master
uniqueability_versatilemaster.description:
Gain 2 Quick Actions per turn
When you select this archetype or advance Tiers, select a number of Primary Actions equal to half your Tier rounded up. You can use each of those Primary Actions as Quick Actions.
At Tier 8: Gain a third Quick Action

effects.description: Can use (Tier/2, rounded up) selected Primary Actions as Quick Actions.

uniqueability_extraordinary.name: Extraordinary
uniqueability_extraordinary.description:
Additional points: (Tier - 2) × 15 added to main pool
Can only spend up to (Tier - 2) × 15 points on Flaws or Traits
For characters seeking to specialize in Unique Abilities

uniqueability_cutabove.name: Cut Above
uniqueability_cutabove.description:
Universal stat bonuses to all core stats: Accuracy, Damage, Conditions, Avoidance, Durability, Resistances, Initiative, Movement
Tiers 1-4: +1 to all | Tiers 5-7: +2 to all | Tiers 8+: +3 to all
For straightforward characters

defensive_stalwart.name: Stalwart
defensive_stalwart.description:
Subtract your Tier from your Avoidance Score
Choose Physical OR Non-Physical damage: take half damage from that type
Specialized damage resistance

defensive_fortress.name: Fortress
defensive_fortress.description:
Add your Tier again to Durability
Consistent protection against all damage

defensive_resilient.name: Resilient
defensive_resilient.description:
Add your Tier to all three Secondary Resistances (Resolve, Stability, Vitality)
Exceptional at resisting condition effects

defensive_immutable.name: Immutable
defensive_immutable.description:
Choose one Secondary Resistance type
You gain complete immunity in that resistance type
Unshakeable defense against specific attacks

defensive_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
defensive_juggernaut.description:
Increase your maximum Health Pool by 5 × Tier
Extra health reserves for attrition warfare

specialattack_normal.name: Normal
specialattack_normal.description:
Select 3 Specialty Upgrades at half cost
Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 6)
Maximum customization flexibility

specialattack_specialist.name: Specialist
specialattack_specialist.description:
All limits selected must be applied to all attacks
Limits provide Points × (Tier ÷ 3)
Higher return but restricted playstyle

specialattack_paragon.name: Paragon
specialattack_paragon.description:
Each special attack receives 10 × Tier points
Cannot take Limits
Consistent performance without drawbacks

specialattack_onetrick.name: One Trick
specialattack_onetrick.description:
Single attack with Tier × 20 points
Cannot take Limits
High-risk, high-reward specialization

specialattack_straightforward.name: Straightforward
specialattack_straightforward.description:
Choose single Limit for all attacks
Limit returns Points × (Tier ÷ 2)
Simple but effective approach

specialattack_shareduses.name: Shared Uses
specialattack_shareduses.description:
10 shared uses among abilities, each attack costs 1-3 uses
Regenerate 1 Use per turn
Tier × 5 point discount per use, cannot take Limits

effects.description: Tier × 5 point discount per use cost.

specialattack_dualnatured.name: Dual-Natured
specialattack_dualnatured.description:
Two distinct Special Attacks, each gets 15 × Tier points
Cannot take Limits
Balanced versatility

specialattack_basic.name: Basic
specialattack_basic.description:
Tier × 10 points for base attack improvements only
No special attacks
Good for builds that use base attack

utility_specialized.name: Specialized
utility_specialized.description: Choose an Attribute, you add your Tier twice to any skill checks made using that Attribute

utility_practical.name: Practical
utility_practical.description: Select 3 skills, you add your Tier twice to any skill checks made using those skills

utility_jackofalltrades.name: Jack of All Trades
utility_jackofalltrades.description: You add your Tier once to all skill checks

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.description: Must have at least half your Tier rounded down in each Combat Attribute, can only add Tier bonus once to each stat across Flaws, Traits, and Primary Actions

requirements.value: Must maintain minimum combat attribute requirements.
requirements.display: Must maintain minimum combat attribute requirements.

unresponsive.name: Unresponsive
unresponsive.description: Cannot take Reactions, don't add Tier to Initiative, cannot benefit from Surprise rounds

powerloss.name: Power Loss
powerloss.description: Lose powers under specific circumstances (discuss with GM)

singletargetspecialist.name: Single Target Specialist
singletargetspecialist.description: Choose Melee OR Ranged attacks only

equipmentdependent.name: Equipment Dependent
equipmentdependent.description: Choose specific item; lose access to one Archetype benefit without it, it is noticable and you can be disarmed of it.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: All conditions you inflict target Resolve resistance instead

robot.name: Robot
robot.description: Immune to most Vitality and Resolve conditions, vulnerable to Hacking/Electricity, requires repairs to heal during a rest rather han natural healing, you count as object for healing purposes.

telekinetic.name: Telekinetic
telekinetic.description: All conditions you inflict target Stability resistance instead

biohacker.name: Biohacker
biohacker.description: All conditions you inflict target Vitality resistance instead

utilitarian.name: Utilitarian
utilitarian.description: Gain 10 extra points for Features, Senses, Movement Abilities, and Descriptors

perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
perfectionist.description: Reroll any natural 1s on d20 rolls

combatreflexes.name: Combat Reflexes
combatreflexes.description: You can take an additional Reaction each round.

action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.name: Quick Base Attack
action_upgrade_base_attack_quick.description: Allows the Base Attack action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_dodge_quick.name: Quick Dodge
action_upgrade_dodge_quick.description: Allows the Dodge action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_brace_quick.name: Quick Brace
action_upgrade_brace_quick.description: Allows the Brace action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_fortify_quick.name: Quick Fortify
action_upgrade_fortify_quick.description: Allows the Fortify action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_aim_quick.name: Quick Aim
action_upgrade_aim_quick.description: Allows the Aim action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_empower_quick.name: Quick Empower
action_upgrade_empower_quick.description: Allows the Empower action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_refine_quick.name: Quick Refine
action_upgrade_refine_quick.description: Allows the Refine action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_quick.name: Quick Assist
action_upgrade_assist_quick.description: Allows the Assist action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.name: Enhanced Assist
action_upgrade_assist_enhanced.description: Range increased to 15 spaces and you can target multiple allies up to your Communication or Intelligence score.

action_upgrade_carry_quick.name: Quick Carry
action_upgrade_carry_quick.description: Allows the Carry action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.name: Effortless Carry
action_upgrade_carry_enhanced.description: No movement speed penalty. Once you've taken this action once on a turn, you can continue to reuse it for free until the end of this turn.

action_upgrade_protect_quick.name: Quick Protect
action_upgrade_protect_quick.description: Allows the Protect action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.name: Guardian
action_upgrade_protect_enhanced.description: You can protect all adjacent allies simultaneously and gain extra reactions equal to half your Tier (rounded up) to use only for the Protect Action.

action_upgrade_use_quick.name: Quick Use
action_upgrade_use_quick.description: Allows the Use action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hasten_quick.name: Quick Hasten
action_upgrade_hasten_quick.description: Allows the Hasten action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_hide_quick.name: Quick Hide
action_upgrade_hide_quick.description: Allows the Hide action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

action_upgrade_prepare_quick.name: Quick Prepare
action_upgrade_prepare_quick.description: Allows the Prepare action to be used as a Quick Action instead of a Primary Action.

disarm.name: Disarm
disarm.description: Forces the target to drop something they're holding. The dropped item can be picked up as a Quick Action. You may attempt to launch the item in any direction a number of spaces equal to how successful your roll was assuming you have the Cpacity to move it.

grab.name: Grab
grab.description: The target cannot move. As an Action the target can make a Stability check against the Condition roll to break free early or as part of their movement to drag you with them follwing the rules for Capacity.

shove.name: Shove
shove.description:
Push or pull the target (Condition roll - Resistance) spaces. Collisions deal falling damage to both entities and you can expend 5 Shoving spaces to knock the target prone. 
    Prone: Adjacent attacks against you gain +Tier to Accuracy, ranged attacks against you suffer -Tier to Accuracy, standing cost 3 movement spaces.

prone.name: Prone
prone.description: Adjacent attacks against you gain +Tier to Accuracy, ranged attacks against you suffer -Tier to Accuracy, standing cost 3 movement spaces.

blind.name: Blind
blind.description: Targets treats all others as visually Hidden. Hidden attackers ignore the target's base Tier Avoidance bonus. When attacking you must roll a Perception check vs the target's Stealth check, the attack is assumed to have missed on a failure.

daze.name: Daze
daze.description: Target cannot take Quick Actions or Reactions.

setup.name: Setup
setup.description: The next Accuracy check against the target adds double your Tier to their regular bonus.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Target's suffer a reduction to their Accuracy checks equal to double your Tier against all targets other than you.

control.name: Control
control.description: You control the target on their next turn. Common uses are making them attack, protect you, or become Stunned. If you or an ally attack them, the Control ends.

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: The target can take no actions or movement, their AV is reduced to 0, and any attacks that hit them are considered critical hits.

weaken.name: Weaken
weaken.description: Reduce the chosen stat by your Tier: Accuracy/Damage/Conditions/Avoidance/Durability/All Resistances. This effect does not expire but the target cannot be affected by more than 1 instance of Weaken.

disablespecials.name: Disable Specials
disablespecials.description:
Target cannot use Special Attacks.
  Mimic: You gain use of the disabled Special Attacks but using your own stats.

frighten.name: Frighten
frighten.description: The target must move away from you and can only take the Hasten or Hide Actions. If there is nowhere to run or hide they may take the Dodge or Brace Actions.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: Target attacks the nearest character indiscriminantly.

aquatic.name: Aquatic
aquatic.description: Swim at full speed in any aquatic environment. You are unaffected by water temperature, pressure, or current when swimming.

debt.name: Debt
debt.description: Someone owes you something. Work with the GM to determine the nature of the debt and what benefits you might gain when attempting to collect.

eideticmemory.name: Eidetic Memory
eideticmemory.description: You can recall any information you've previously encountered with perfect accuracy.

linguist.name: Linguist
linguist.description: You know a dozen languages, including more exotic or ancient ones. If you encounter a language you don’t know, you can attempt to decipher its meaning over time using intelligence.

lock.name: Lock
lock.description: You can place a protective barrier around a container or room. Your bonus to resist someone breaking into the container or room is 3 × your Intelligence. You can only have one lock active at a time, but you can disable and activate a new one at any time from anywhere.

multilimbed.name: Multi-limbed
multilimbed.description: You have additional limbs. Each purchase of this feature grants you one extra limb.

naturalcommunication.name: Natural Communication
naturalcommunication.description: You can converse with specific animal types and sense the health, needs, and recent history of plants. They respond with their level of intelligence and knowledge.

parkourmastery.name: Parkour Mastery
parkourmastery.description: Navigate urban environments using walls, buildings, and obstacles as movement paths automatically.

personalvehicle.name: Personal Vehicle
personalvehicle.description: You own a vehicle that allows you to travel quickly.

speakwithanimals.name: Speak with Animals
speakwithanimals.description: You can telepathically communicate with animals, and they can respond in kind. For 1 less point, you may instead communicate with only one specific type of animal.

theprophesiedone.name: The Prophesied One
theprophesiedone.description: A prophecy involves you. Those who believe in it will go to great lengths to assist you. Work with the GM to determine the prophecy's nature and cost.

waterwalking.name: Water Walking
waterwalking.description: Walk on any liquid surface as if it were solid ground automatically.

ancestralknowledge.name: Ancestral Knowledge
ancestralknowledge.description: You can communicate with ancestral spirits for guidance.

assistant.name: Assistant
assistant.description: You can call upon your personal assistant to help with mundane activities such as a butler, driver, or secretary. The assistant can handle routine tasks, carry out errands, and serve as a go-between for important social interactions, offering access to otherwise unavailable opportunities.

auraticsway.name: Auratic Sway
auraticsway.description: Emits a subtle aura that affects emotions or moods in the immediate vicinity. You can make an Intimidation or Communication check against everyone nearby to slightly alter their mood or emotions.

distinguishedbackground.name: Distinguished Background
distinguishedbackground.description: Your distinct heritage, noble birth, or foreign origin marks you as notable wherever you go. This grants you respect and curiosity that can open doors to influential individuals, exclusive events, and valuable information. However, it also makes you memorable and may create unwanted attention or suspicion depending on local politics and attitudes.

dreamwalker.name: Dreamwalker
dreamwalker.description: You can enter and interact with dreams.

elasticmovement.name: Elastic Movement
elasticmovement.description: Stretch your limbs to reach distant objects or compress your body to fit through spaces one-quarter your normal size automatically.

fallproof.name: Fall Proof
fallproof.description: Completely negate fall damage from any height automatically.

familiar.name: Familiar
familiar.description: You have a small-sized creature or construct that obeys your commands. You can see through its senses and control its movement. It uses your skills for any checks; if it's a creature, it uses your Awareness instead of Mobility. It cannot take actions other than skill checks. It has 0 in all combat stats, and if it takes damage, it is destroyed and cannot be resummoned until after a full rest. The familiar can scout dangerous areas, retrieve objects, or act as a distraction.

forbiddance.name: Forbiddance
forbiddance.description: Once per rest, over the course of an hour, you may create a ward that protects up to a 100 by 100 space area from observation, teleportation, and communication through the barrier. Choose one category of being (work with GM to define). Chosen creatures take (10 + Focus or Power) damage per turn spent in the area. The ward lasts one day. If you use this feature every day for 100 days in the same spot, the effect becomes permanent.

glyphofwarding.name: Glyph of Warding
glyphofwarding.description: It takes one hour to set up the trap, and you may set it to release one of your special attacks. The glyph may not be moved from where it was set up. You can have a number of active traps equal to your Intelligence score. If the trap is triggered, the attack is released. You suffer/are limited by your limits when setting the trap. Hidden traps require an Awareness or Intelligence check against double your Intelligence to detect.

juryrigging.name: Jury Rigging
juryrigging.description: You can repair or modify the function of any item or object without using materials. However, the repair is temporary and will break again at the end of the session or after intense use. The quality and duration of your repair is based on an Intelligence check determined by the GM.

lightsleeper.name: Light Sleeper
lightsleeper.description: You do not require sleep and are passively aware of your surroundings even while resting. Your Awareness checks are not reduced while resting, and you can remain alert during the party's rest periods. You still require the same rest duration to recover HP, Efforts, and ability uses.

mastersculptor.name: Master Sculptor
mastersculptor.description: Choose a specific material (stone, metal, wood, clay, etc.). You can precisely shape, mold, or alter that material at rapid pace, working on up to 8 cubic meters per minute. This allows you to create tools, artistic works, or modify existing structures made of your chosen material without requiring traditional crafting tools.

materialshaping.name: Material Shaping
materialshaping.description: You can temporarily transform mundane materials and objects into different forms. Convert one material into another similar material, or reshape an object into a different object of similar size and density. You cannot create complex mechanical devices or change the fundamental properties of materials (turning wood into metal, etc.).

mysticguardian.name: Mystic Guardian
mysticguardian.description: You can create temporary magical guardians or constructs that can complete simple tasks. These guardians can act as watchmen, couriers, or assistants in problem-solving tasks.

objectencryption.name: Object Encryption
objectencryption.description: You can seal items in a protective field to prevent tampering.

prodigy.name: Prodigy
prodigy.description: After 4 hour of focused study, gain Tier bonus to checks involving that specific topic until next rest.

prophet.name: Prophet
prophet.description: You receive visions of a future that may or may not happen. Once per session, you may attempt to force one of these visions. Roll a d100; the higher the number, the more accurate and less vague the vision becomes.

psychiclink.name: Psychic Link
psychiclink.description: You can share or transfer memories with a touch, or form a temporary psychic connection with another being. This can be used for strategic coordination, emotional support, or unique insight.

psychometry.name: Psychometry
psychometry.description: You can perceive the recent history and emotional imprints of objects through touch.

safehouse.name: Safe House
safehouse.description: You have access to a home that supports more than just yourself.

socialnetwork.name: Social Network
socialnetwork.description: You have extensive connections with various influential individuals. These connections can provide critical assistance, such as opening doors to exclusive events, securing resources, or obtaining valuable information.

spiritcommunication.name: Spirit Communication
spiritcommunication.description: You can speak with the spirits of the recently deceased in the immediate area.

spiritualbind.name: Spiritual Bind
spiritualbind.description: You can temporarily bind yourself to an object or location, granting limited influence, observation, or protection.

sponsor.name: Sponsor
sponsor.description: Someone has invested a great deal of time and/or money to get you where you are. You have greater access to resources, and they are inclined to protect their investment. However, you are beholden to them, and they might cut their losses if things get too dicey.

stealthguidance.name: Stealth Guidance
stealthguidance.description: You can add your Awareness score to the Stealth checks of any allies within 3 spaces of you that you designate. This ability helps your team move undetected while you coordinate their movements and watch for threats.

streetperformer.name: Street Performer
streetperformer.description: You can always find opportunities to earn money and resources through performances, hustling, or social connections. Make a Communication check to acquire money or secure free lodging and meals. The GM determines the difficulty based on the amount needed and local circumstances. Success may involve entertaining crowds, making deals, or leveraging social networks.

streetwisenetwork.name: Streetwise Network
streetwisenetwork.description: You have connections throughout various segments of society, providing you with valuable information about local people and places wherever you travel.

superstrength.name: Super Strength
superstrength.description: Add your Tier to your Capacity score.

technopathy.name: Technopathy
technopathy.description: You can interface directly with electronic devices and understand their functions/data.

temporalecho.name: Temporal Echo
temporalecho.description: You can temporarily replay past events regarding persons, places, and objects. This ability allows you to uncover secrets, retrace steps, or resolve mysteries tied to your surroundings.

underworldconnection.name: Underworld Connection
underworldconnection.description: You maintain a reliable contact within the criminal underworld who can facilitate communication and deliver messages discreetly across long distances. Your connection can also provide contraband, information, or covert assistance.

wellconnected.name: Well Connected
wellconnected.description: Once per session, if you say, "I Know a Guy," workshop with the GM to create an NPC who can help you with a specific task. GM secretly determines your relationship strength. Based on your history and request difficulty, they'll decide what favor or payment is required.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.description: You are a master of creating experimental tinctures and tonics. The concoctions work a single time to accomplish a specific goal. You will need time to gather the required ingredients, requiring an Intelligence or Awareness check to forage or rolling a d100 and Communication to purchase. The GM will decide the DCs, the amount of time it takes, and any costs.

astralprojection.name: Astral Projection
astralprojection.description: While resting, you can travel to other locations using a spectral form. You are visible but intangible while astral projecting, able to move through solid objects and observe your surroundings. You can return to your body at will from any distance. You can use this form to gather information or travel to otherwise unreachable places.

bard.name: Bard
bard.description: You can sing a tune to help inspire others. For the next hour, a number of present characters up to your Communication score can add your Tier to a skill check declared before they roll.

consciousnesstransfer.name: Consciousness Transfer
consciousnesstransfer.description: You can temporarily swap consciousness with willing participants.

corruption.name: Corruption
corruption.description: Work with GM to establish corruption mechanics. When taking this feature, choose a trigger condition that grants significant power bonuses but risks permanent character corruption through failed resistance rolls.

enhancedprocessing.name: Enhanced Processing
enhancedprocessing.description: Think and perceive at extremely accelerated speeds while performing hundreds of simple mental tasks simultaneously. This allows you to process information, analyze situations, and react with superhuman mental velocity while tracking multiple variables in complex problems.

hexer.name: Hexer
hexer.description: You are able to inflict complex, lasting, and nearly incurable curses on others. To cast the curse, the target must be aware they are being cursed and within 18 spaces of you for one minute. Additionally, you must know the target's true name and/or one special condition determined by you and the GM. Work with GM to determine appropriate curse effects and lifting conditions.

hiddentrap.name: Hidden Trap
hiddentrap.description: It takes one hour to set up the trap, and you may set it to release one of your special attacks. You can set a number of traps equal to your Awareness per rest. If the trap is triggered, the attack is released. You suffer/are limited by your limits when setting the trap. Hidden traps require an Awareness check against double your Awareness to detect and a Mobility check to disarm or avoid.

immortality.name: Immortality
immortality.description: You are immortal, you can be killed but you will return to life after 24 hours. Work with the GM to establish a limitation for said immortality, a way in which you can truly be killed. Additionally, determine where you return and if there are any changes that affect you.

inventor.name: Inventor
inventor.description: You can create technological inventions. These inventions work a single time and to accomplish a specific goal. The GM will determine the Intelligence check difficulty based on the setting. It will take a number of hours of active downtime equal to the difficulty minus 10. Requires a suitable lab or workshop.

knowitall.name: Know It All
knowitall.description: You're very bossy and like to tell others how to do things. If you can spend one minute explaining how to do something better, another character can add your Intelligence to any check, provided they follow your advice.

longrangeteleportation.name: Long-Range Teleportation
longrangeteleportation.description: Teleport to any location that you can clearly visualize or have previously visited automatically after spending at least 1 minute in preparation, the longer the distance the greater the amount of time it takes.

memorymanipulation.name: Memory Manipulation
memorymanipulation.description: You can view, modify, or implant memories in willing or unconscious subjects. Cannot be used on actively resisting targets.

mindreading.name: Mind Reading
mindreading.description: Make an Intelligence or Awareness check to attempt to read a target's mind that you can see. The GM determines the difficulty based on the target's mental defenses and what information you're seeking. Success reveals the desired thoughts, memories, or knowledge the target possesses.

molecularmanipulation.name: Molecular Manipulation
molecularmanipulation.description: You can convert one mundane material into another mundane material of similar density and hardness. Wood can become plastic, stone can become metal, or cloth can become leather.

perceptionfilter.name: Perception Filter
perceptionfilter.description: Temporarily render objects or areas unnoticed by others. May require Stealth checks.

quantumpocket.name: Quantum Pocket
quantumpocket.description: You can store and retrieve objects in a subspace storage. This ability allows you to carry large or dangerous items without arousing suspicion or taking up inventory space.

ritualist.name: Ritualist
ritualist.description: You can create magical rituals. These rituals work a single time and to accomplish a specific goal. The GM will determine the check difficulty based on the setting. It will take one uninterrupted hour to complete and may require special ingredients, such as a specific location, blood, or a rare object.

selfsacrifice.name: Self-Sacrifice
selfsacrifice.description: As you activate this feature, increase your Tier by 4, for 6 rounds. At the end of the 6 rounds, you die. May change the penalty and/or bonus for something equivalent, discuss with GM. Cannot use if you have abilities that prevent death.

telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
telekinesis.description: You can move and manipulate objects at a distance using mental force. You can affect objects within your line of sight. The weight limit is based on your Capacity score: light objects effortlessly, medium objects with concentration, and heavy objects requiring significant effort.

telepath.name: Telepath
telepath.description:
You can communicate telepathically with any sentient being you can see or are familiar with across unlimited distances. They can communicate back if willing. You can maintain simultaneous mental links with a number of beings equal to your Intelligence score. Additionally, you can:
Share complex memories, emotions, or sensory experiences
Establish permanent mental bonds that persist even when unconscious
Create group mental networks allowing all linked minds to communicate
Attempt to influence thoughts and emotions of willing or weakened minds

bleedingedge.name: Bleeding Edge
bleedingedge.description: Your technology is the most advanced and powerful there is, allowing you greater feats beyond what normal technology can accomplish. However, it can only be repaired, maintained, modified, or upgraded using very specific or hard-to-find tools, methods, or materials.

chameleon.name: Chameleon
chameleon.description: You can effortlessly alter details about yourself, like hair color, hair length, skin tone, or eye color. You can't change things like bone structure, body shape, height, weight, or other drastic features. This ability can help you blend into a crowd or adopt a new persona during social encounters.

consciousnessprojection.name: Consciousness Projection
consciousnessprojection.description: You can project your consciousness to other locations simultaneously, experiencing multiple places at once. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and duration.

hivemind.name: Hive Mind
hivemind.description: You can link multiple minds into a temporary collective consciousness, sharing all thoughts and knowledge.

perfectsanctuary.name: Perfect Sanctuary
perfectsanctuary.description: Create an impenetrable zone around you and your allies for a short duration. Nothing can enter or leave this zone without your permission. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and duration.

realityrevision.name: Reality Revision
realityrevision.description: You can make minor alterations to recent events (within the last hour), changing their outcomes. Work with GM to establish limitations and consequences.

timetravel.name: Time Travel
timetravel.description: Move forward or backward through time automatically after spending 1 hour in preparation. Work with GM to determine limitations and potential paradox consequences.

darkvision.name: Darkvision
darkvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see clearly in complete darkness as if it were dim light.

enhancedhearing.name: Enhanced Hearing
enhancedhearing.description: Make Awareness checks to hear sounds at frequencies beyond normal human range or at much greater distances.

scentenhancement.name: Scent Enhancement
scentenhancement.description: Make Awareness checks to identify specific individuals, substances, or emotional states through smell.

tactilesensitivity.name: Tactile Sensitivity
tactilesensitivity.description: Make Awareness checks to detect minute textures, vibrations, or temperature differences through touch.

magneticsense.name: Magnetic Sense
magneticsense.description: Make Awareness checks to determine cardinal directions and detect magnetic fields or metal objects.

scenttracking.name: Scent Tracking
scenttracking.description: Make Awareness checks to follow trails by scent, even hours or days old.

echolocation.name: Echolocation
echolocation.description: Make Awareness checks to navigate and identify objects in complete darkness using sound reflection. Range: Tier × 10 Sp.

thermalvision.name: Thermal Vision
thermalvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see heat signatures through walls and detect living creatures by their body temperature.

microscopicvision.name: Microscopic Vision
microscopicvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see cellular-level detail, identify microscopic organisms, or examine fine craftsmanship.

tremorsense.name: Tremor Sense
tremorsense.description: Make Awareness checks to detect movement and identify creatures through ground vibrations. Range: Tier × 5 Sp.

aurasight.name: Aura Sight
aurasight.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive emotional states, health conditions, and supernatural auras around living beings.

timesense.name: Time Sense
timesense.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive temporal distortions, time dilation effects, or chronological inconsistencies.

xrayvision.name: X-Ray Vision
xrayvision.description: Make Awareness checks to see through solid objects up to Tier × 2 Sp thick, revealing hidden structures or concealed items.

psychicresonance.name: Psychic Resonance
psychicresonance.description: Make Awareness checks to detect psychic activity, mental powers in use, or lingering psychic imprints.

dimensionalsight.name: Dimensional Sight
dimensionalsight.description: Make Awareness checks to see into adjacent dimensions, detect dimensional rifts, or spot interdimensional travelers.

lifedetection.name: Life Detection
lifedetection.description: Make Awareness checks to sense all living creatures within Tier × 100 Sp, regardless of concealment or barriers.

energysight.name: Energy Sight
energysight.description: Make Awareness checks to see all forms of energy (electrical, magical, radioactive) as visible spectrums.

precognition.name: Precognition
precognition.description: Make Awareness checks to glimpse potential futures.

scrying.name: Scrying
scrying.description: Make Awareness checks to remotely view any location you can clearly visualize or have previously visited. You can see and hear as if you were present at that location. Range is unlimited but clarity decreases with distance and unfamiliarity.

auraanalysis.name: Aura Analysis
auraanalysis.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive detailed information about any living being's powers, health status, emotional state, recent activities, and supernatural nature. This reveals their capabilities, conditions, and recent significant experiences through their personal aura.

truthsight.name: Truth Sight
truthsight.description: Make Awareness checks to see through all forms of deception, illusion, disguise, and concealment. This reveals the true nature of people, objects, and situations, cutting through magical and mundane forms of misdirection.

uniquesense.name: Unique Sense
uniquesense.description: Gain a supernatural sense for a specific phenomenon within 10 spaces at Tier 1, doubling each additional Tier. You automatically detect obvious manifestations; subtle ones require opposed Awareness checks. Examples include effects from a Descriptor (Electricity, Space, Time, Magic), a type of being (Human, divine beings, eldritch horror, powered person), or usage of an ability (Teleporting, Burrowing, specific Feature usage).

extended_range.name: Extended Range
extended_range.description: Ranged attacks reach 30 spaces instead of 15.

long_range.name: Long Range
long_range.description: Ranged attacks reach 100 spaces instead of 15.

perception_range.name: Perception Range
perception_range.description: Direct attacks can target anyone you can see instead of 30 spaces.

enhanced_scale.name: Enhanced Scale
enhanced_scale.description: Double the size of Area attacks (e.g., 6sp radius, 12sp cone, 24sp line).

precise.name: Precise
precise.description: Choose which targets are affected by Area attacks.

ranged_aoe.name: Ranged AOE
ranged_aoe.description: Area attacks can originate from a designated point within 15 spaces.

accurateattack.name: Accurate Attack
accurateattack.description: +Tier to Accuracy rolls, -Tier to Damage and Condition rolls. A basic accuracy/damage trade-off.

reliableaccuracy.name: Reliable Accuracy
reliableaccuracy.description: Advantage on Accuracy rolls, but suffer a -4 penalty to all Accuracy rolls. For consistent hitting with a reduced total bonus.

criticalaccuracy.name: Critical Accuracy
criticalaccuracy.description: Your critical hit range is expanded to 15-20 on the d20.

powerfulcritical.name: Powerful Critical
powerfulcritical.description: Add your Tier bonus again to Damage and Condition rolls on critical hits. Enhances the strength of your critical hit effects.

overhit.name: Overhit
overhit.description: When your Accuracy roll exceeds the target's Avoidance by 5 or more, add half the difference to your Effect roll. Rewards high accuracy against low-defense targets.

blitz.name: Blitz
blitz.description: +1 Accuracy for every 6 spaces you moved toward the target this turn. A mobile attacker bonus that stacks with movement.

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.description: Critical hits trigger an additional attack against a different target within range.

requirements.value: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.
requirements.display: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

doubletap.name: Double-Tap
doubletap.description: Critical hits trigger the same attack again against the same target.

requirements.value: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.
requirements.display: The secondary attack cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

explosivecritical.name: Explosive Critical
explosivecritical.description: Critical hits trigger an attack against all enemies within 3 spaces of the target, if the attack would also hit them.

requirements.value: Cannot apply to AOE attacks. Secondary attacks cannot crit from the target being Stunned.
requirements.display: Cannot apply to AOE attacks. Secondary attacks cannot crit from the target being Stunned.

powerattack.name: Power Attack
powerattack.description: +Tier to Damage rolls, -Tier to Accuracy rolls. A basic damage/accuracy trade-off.

highimpact.name: High Impact
highimpact.description: Replace your 3d6 damage roll with a flat 15 damage. Eliminates damage variance for consistent output.

enhancedeffect.name: Enhanced Effect
enhancedeffect.description: Add one additional damage die to your damage rolls. This increases your damage potential and average.

reliableeffect.name: Reliable Effect
reliableeffect.description: Roll an extra damage die, then drop the lowest result.

criticaleffect.name: Critical Effect
criticaleffect.description: All effect dice explode on rolls of 5 or 6. Dice continue rolling when showing 5-6, and results are cumulative.

armorpiercing.name: Armor Piercing
armorpiercing.description: Suffer a -Tier penalty to your Attack rolls to ignore the target's Durability bonus from their Endurance attribute. For Direct attacks, reduce the Damage roll instead of the Attack roll.

brutal.name: Brutal
brutal.description: When your Damage roll exceeds the target's Durability by 10 or more, you deal extra damage equal to half the difference.

bleed.name: Bleed
bleed.description: The target takes the identical damage again at the end of your next 2 turns.

splashdamage.name: Splash Damage
splashdamage.description: Adjacent targets take Tier+1d6 damage if your Attack roll would hit their Avoidance. Applies to Melee and Ranged attacks only.

environmental.name: Environmental
environmental.description: All hexes hit by the attack become hazardous terrain until the start of your next turn. Each rank after the first is an extra turn. Any character entering or ending their turn in an affected space takes the attack's Damage and Condition. Cannot have 'Precise' upgrade.

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.description: Deal double damage to structures and vehicles. A specialized anti-object enhancement.

leech.name: Leech
leech.description: Regain HP equal to half the damage you deal.

finishingblow.name: Finishing Blow
finishingblow.description: If your attack reduces an enemy to 5×rank HP or below, the enemy is defeated instead. Maximum 3 ranks.

cullingstrike.name: Culling Strike
cullingstrike.description: If your attack reduces an enemy below 1/5 of their maximum HP, the enemy is defeated instead.

criticalcondition.name: Critical Condition
criticalcondition.description: Your Condition rolls critically hit on a 15-20 range on the d20.

lastingcondition.name: Lasting Condition
lastingcondition.description: If your Condition roll exceeds the target's Resistance by 10 or more, the condition's duration extends by 1 turn.

masseffect.name: Mass Effect
masseffect.description: A single Direct condition attack can target up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously. Suffers a -Tier penalty to Condition rolls.

collateralcondition.name: Collateral Condition
collateralcondition.description: A successful condition triggers the attack against all targets within a 3-space burst.

requirements.value: Cannot apply to AOE attacks, and triggers only once per attack.
requirements.display: Cannot apply to AOE attacks, and triggers only once per attack.

contagious.name: Contagious
contagious.description: A successful condition triggers the attack against the nearest enemy. Can chain up to Tier/2 times (rounded down) per attack.

cursed.name: Cursed
cursed.description: If 2 × (Condition roll - Resistance) is greater than or equal to the target's remaining HP, the condition becomes permanent.

overwhelmingaffliction.name: Overwhelming Affliction
overwhelmingaffliction.description: If your Condition roll exceeds the target's Resistance by 3 × Tier, the condition becomes permanent regardless of the target's HP.

heavystrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavystrike.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, adding +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, but -Tier to Accuracy rolls.

quickstrikes.name: Quick Strikes
quickstrikes.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, allowing you to make the same Melee attack three times against a single target, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

whirlwindstrike.name: Whirlwind Strike
whirlwindstrike.description: A single Melee attack targets up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

headshot.name: Headshot
headshot.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, adding +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, but -Tier to Accuracy rolls.

barrage.name: Barrage
barrage.description: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge, allowing you to make the same Ranged attack three times against a single target, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

scattershot.name: Scatter Shot
scattershot.description: A single Ranged attack targets up to your Tier in enemies simultaneously, but with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy rolls.

flurryofblows.name: Flurry of Blows
flurryofblows.description: Make the same attack three times against a single target, with a -Tier penalty to Accuracy, Damage, and Condition rolls. Works with Melee or Ranged attacks.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.description: Move up to 6 spaces in a straight line toward the target as part of the attack. This movement occurs during the attack resolution.

splinter.name: Splinter
splinter.description: Defeating an enemy triggers another attack against a new target before your turn ends. Can chain up to Tier/2 additional attacks (rounded up).

menacing.name: Menacing
menacing.description: Reducing an enemy to 0 HP allows an Intimidation attempt against all enemies within 3 spaces of the target. Enemies with HP less than or equal to your Intimidation bonus will surrender.

disengage.name: Disengage
disengage.description: A successful hit prevents opportunity attacks from all hit targets until the end of your turn.

extraattack.name: Extra Attack
extraattack.description: A successful hit with a successful effect allows an identical attack against the same target. Must succeed on both Accuracy and Effect. Can only occur once per turn.

analyzingstrike.name: Analyzing Strike
analyzingstrike.description: +1 to a chosen stat (Accuracy/Damage/Conditions) for each previous Analyzing Strike against the same target. The bonus is capped at your Tier and resets if you skip attacking the target for one turn or activate it on another target.

followupstrike.name: Follow-Up Strike
followupstrike.description: A successful hit with a successful effect allows one Base Attack against the same target. Can only occur once per turn.

counterattack.name: Counterattack
counterattack.description: Using an attack against an enemy that missed you or failed their effect against you adds your Tier to a chosen roll (Accuracy, Damage, or Condition, selected at purchase).

requirements.value: Cannot use with limits requiring you to be attacked or affected
requirements.display: Cannot use with limits requiring you to be attacked or affected

exploit.name: Exploit
exploit.description: +Tier to Damage and Condition rolls against targets currently afflicted by any Condition.

prioritytarget.name: Priority Target
prioritytarget.description: After hitting a target, mark them as the Priority Target until the start of your next turn. Other characters gain a Tier/2 Accuracy bonus (rounded up) against this target. Can only be used once per turn.

bully.name: Bully
bully.description: Damaging a target with a Power score equal to or less than yours allows you to force a 1-space movement.

martialartist.name: Martial Artist
martialartist.description: Critical hits allow you to choose to apply Grab, a 3-space forced movement, or the Prone condition.

grappler.name: Grappler
grappler.description: Deal +Tier damage against targets you have Grabbed.

minionslayer.name: Minion Slayer
minionslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 10 maximum HP.

captainslayer.name: Captain Slayer
captainslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 25 maximum HP.

eliteslayer.name: Elite Slayer
eliteslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 50 maximum HP.

bossslayer.name: Boss Slayer
bossslayer.description: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing. Bonus applies against enemies with 100 maximum HP.

luckystrike.name: Lucky Strike
luckystrike.description: Using an Effort on this attack allows you to roll an extra die on the Effort roll.

compressedrelease.name: Compressed Release
compressedrelease.description: If you have an active Aura ability, you can disable it until the start of your next turn to add +Tier to your Accuracy, Damage, and Condition rolls.

domain.name: Domain
domain.description: If you have an active Barrier ability, gain +Tier to a chosen roll when attacking targets within your Barrier. Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

towerdefense.name: Tower Defense
towerdefense.description: If you have an active Wall ability, gain +Tier to a chosen roll when attacking targets on the opposite side of your Wall. Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

channeled.name: Channeled
channeled.description: For Ranged or AOE attacks. Spend your Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat the attack. Gain +Tier to a chosen roll for each consecutive turn channeling (maximum 5 turns). Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

focused.name: Focused
focused.description: For Melee attacks. Spend your Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat the attack. Gain +Tier to a chosen roll for each consecutive turn focusing (maximum 5 turns). Select Accuracy, Damage, or Conditions when purchasing.

charge-up.name: Charge-Up
charge-up.description: Must use Primary Action on consecutive turns to charge before using attack

reserves.name: Reserves
reserves.description: Can only be used 3 times per combat. Regain all uses after combat ends

cooldown.name: Cooldown
cooldown.description: Cannot use again for 1 turn after use

unreliable.name: Unreliable
unreliable.description: Roll d20 before use; if under 5, attack fails and action is wasted

combo_move.name: Combo Move
combo_move.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn

unhealthy.name: Unhealthy
unhealthy.description: Can only use when below max HP

irregular1.name: Irregular 1
irregular1.description: Roll d20, DC 5 to activate each turn

relentless.name: Relentless
relentless.description: Dealt damage to enemy last turn

overwhelm.name: Overwhelm
overwhelm.description: Dealt damage to enemy this turn

temporary3.name: Temporary 3
temporary3.description: Activate for 3 turns, recharges after 1 minute rest

timid.name: Timid
timid.description: At max HP with no conditions

unbreakable.name: Unbreakable
unbreakable.description: Been hit but took no damage since last turn

untouchable.name: Untouchable
untouchable.description: All attacks missed since last turn

temporary2.name: Temporary 2
temporary2.description: Activate for 2 turns, recharges after 1 minute rest

temporary1.name: Temporary 1
temporary1.description: Activate for 1 turn, recharges after 1 minute rest

irregular2.name: Irregular 2
irregular2.description: Roll d20, DC 10 to activate each turn

dangerous.name: Dangerous
dangerous.description: No allies within 15 spaces, no civilians within 30 spaces

avenger.name: Avenger
avenger.description: Ally unconscious or great peril occurred

character_type_player_character.name: Player Character
character_type_player_character.description: A unique, player-controlled character with a full range of abilities.

character_type_npc_ally.name: NPC Ally
character_type_npc_ally.description: A friendly non-player character that assists the party.

character_type_other.name: Other
character_type_other.description: Select a specific character type from the sub-categories.

fire.name: Fire
fire.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to forge materials without tools, melt locks, create emergency lighting, or purify contaminated substances through controlled burning
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to regulate temperature in buildings, melt ice barriers, or create smoke signals visible for miles
Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense heat sources through walls, track warm-blooded creatures, or identify recent fires
Crafting: Make Intelligence checks to work glass, ceramics, or metals with precision using controlled flame
Resistance: Immune to heat-based damage and environmental effects from extreme temperatures

water.name: Water
water.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to purify contaminated water sources, create ice tools/weapons, or navigate underwater environments
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create fog banks for concealment, redirect waterways, or cause/stop precipitation
Detection: Make Awareness checks to locate water sources underground, sense moisture levels, or track creatures through wet environments
Life Support: Make Intelligence checks to extract moisture from air in deserts or create breathable air pockets underwater
Resistance: Immune to drowning and pressure effects underwater

earth.name: Earth
earth.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to locate mineral deposits, create stone tools/barriers, or navigate underground
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create earthquakes, shape landscape, or reinforce structures
Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense vibrations through ground, locate underground spaces, or identify geological instabilities
Construction: Make Intelligence checks to shape stone into precise architectural forms or create permanent fortifications
Resistance: Immune to crushing damage and effects from unstable terrain

air.name: Air
air.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to create updrafts for assisted flight, carry messages via wind, or clear toxic gases
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to create localized weather patterns, disperse crowds with wind, or amplify/muffle sounds
Detection: Make Awareness checks to track scents across great distances, overhear distant conversations, or sense air pressure changes
Navigation: Make Awareness checks to determine wind patterns for sailing/flying or predict weather changes
Resistance: Immune to suffocation and airborne toxins

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to power electronic devices, create precise electrical discharges, or generate electromagnetic fields
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to disrupt electronics, create localized storms, or generate light displays
Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense electrical activity, track electronic devices, or identify electrical malfunctions
Communication: Make Intelligence checks to transmit messages through electrical networks or interfere with communications
Resistance: Immune to electrical damage and electromagnetic interference

ice.name: Ice
ice.description:
Utility Applications: Make Intelligence checks to preserve materials indefinitely, create precise ice constructs, or generate sub-zero environments
Environmental Control: Make Intelligence checks to freeze liquids instantly, create slippery surfaces, or generate protective barriers
Detection: Make Awareness checks to sense temperature variations, track warm creatures in cold environments, or identify frozen substances
Construction: Make Intelligence checks to create temporary ice structures or reinforce existing materials with ice
Resistance: Immune to cold damage and hypothermia effects

kinetic.name: Kinetic
kinetic.description:
Combat Enhancement: Enhance the force of moving objects, turning a pebble into a deadly projectile or a thrown spear into a devastating missile
Movement: Ignore impediments like mud, snow, or rubble, maintaining momentum without slowing
Defense: Absorb kinetic energy from impacts and transfer it elsewhere, such as reversing the force back to an attacker
Mobility: Defy gravity temporarily, running on walls or maintaining footing on impossibly narrow surfaces
Resistance: Immune to falling damage and impact-based effects

plasma.name: Plasma
plasma.description:
Environmental Control: Surround yourself with glowing plasma, providing light and damaging nearby enemies with searing heat
Detection: Detect the presence of plasma generators, power sources, or active weapons within a wide radius
Utility Applications: Manipulate plasma-like materials to weld, seal, or fuse objects permanently
Energy Mastery: Make Intelligence checks to generate controlled plasma discharges or manipulate existing plasma fields
Resistance: Withstand high-energy environments, including intense radiation or plasma discharges

biological.name: Biological
biological.description:
Regeneration: Heal from significant injuries and lost limbs or organs relatively quickly
Toxin Mastery: Identify, neutralize, or create potent toxins and antidotes instinctively. Highly resistant to toxins, diseases, and biological effects
Animal Connection: Form deep connections with animals, influencing their actions and understanding their emotions
Plant Revival: Revive withered plants by touch, causing them to grow rapidly, even in barren environments
Resistance: Immune to diseases, toxins, and biological manipulation

technology.name: Technology
technology.description:
Machine Communication: Communicate with machines as though they were sentient, intuitively diagnosing malfunctions or errors
Decryption: Make Intelligence checks to decode encrypted data or bypass advanced security systems
Remote Control: Remotely interact with and control electronic systems, such as locking or unlocking doors, or rerouting power
System Override: Temporarily interface with and influence complex systems like vehicles or automated devices
Resistance: Immune to technological surveillance and electronic interference

mental.name: Mental
mental.description:
Memory Sharing: Share vivid memories, ideas, or concepts directly into another's mind, bypassing verbal communication entirely
Emotion Amplification: Amplify the emotions of those around you to overwhelming levels, inducing fear, joy, or rage
Psychic Defense: Shield yourself from psychic intrusion, emotional manipulation, or mind-altering effects
Memory Recovery: Instantly retrieve forgotten memories or suppressed knowledge, including sensory details from years past
Resistance: Immune to mental manipulation and psychic attacks

arcane.name: Arcane
arcane.description:
Magic Detection: Detect and analyze magical effects within a wide radius, understanding their source and purpose
Glyph Mastery: Decipher, replicate, or counter magical glyphs and sigils, even if highly advanced
Magical Marking: Leave subtle magical traces on objects or locations, readable only by those with arcane knowledge
Artifact Sense: Sense and locate magical artifacts or enchanted items, regardless of concealment
Resistance: Immune to magical effects and supernatural manipulation

atomic.name: Atomic
atomic.description:
Atomic Perception: Perceive the atomic structure of objects, identifying weaknesses or flaws for precise interaction
Density Alteration: Alter the density or composition of objects with a focused effort, such as hardening glass into steel
Atomic Manipulation: Ability to alter the distance between atoms for objects you can touch
Environmental Immunity: Immune to any extreme temperature or radiation effects
Advanced Applications: Ability to start atomic chain reactions. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign

cosmic.name: Cosmic
cosmic.description:
Universal Knowledge: Intuitively know information about the state of the universe, the cosmos and other cosmic beings
Cosmic Presence: Inspire awe or reverence in those around you, projecting a cosmic aura of authority
Environmental Immunity: Operate unharmed in any environments, immune to any environmental effect
Energy Mastery: Make Intelligence checks to manipulate cosmic forces and stellar energies
Advanced Applications: You can infuse other beings with Cosmic energy and power. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign
